steps.title: Identify the contextual signal
steps.content: The text describes a research shortcoming (myopic focus on a few wealthy regions) due to limited data. The blank describes what researchers later did with that shortcoming "after gaining new access" to data from Africa and Eastern Europe — i.e., they fixed or improved it.

steps.title: Match the precise word
steps.content:
Ameliorate means to make better or improve — exactly fitting addressing a shortcoming. Postulate (assume), sanction (approve/punish), and rationalize (justify) don't mean improving or correcting.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
